segments.text: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye come into the land which I give you, then shall the land keep a sabbath unto the LORD.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: And the LORD spake unto Moses in mount Sinai, saying,
Six years thou shalt sow thy field, and six years thou shalt prune thy vineyard, and gather in the fruit thereof;
But in the seventh year shall be a sabbath of rest unto the land, a sabbath for the LORD: thou shalt neither sow thy field, nor prune thy vineyard.
That which groweth of its own accord of thy harvest thou shalt not reap, neither gather the grapes of thy vine undressed: for it is a year of rest unto the land.

footnotes: of thy vine…: Heb. of thy separation

segments.text: And thou shalt number seven sabbaths of years unto thee, seven times seven years; and the space of the seven sabbaths of years shall be unto thee forty and nine years.
Ye shall not therefore oppress one another; but thou shalt fear thy God: for I am the LORD your God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Wherefore ye shall do my statutes, and keep my judgments, and do them; and ye shall dwell in the land in safety.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The land shall not be sold for ever: for the land is mine; for ye are strangers and sojourners with me.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: for ever: or, to be quite cut off: Heb. for cutting off
heading: Land Ownership

segments.text: And if thy brother be waxen poor, and fallen in decay with thee; then thou shalt relieve him: yea, though he be a stranger, or a sojourner; that he may live with thee.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For unto me the children of Israel are servants; they are my servants whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt: I am the LORD your God.
segments.speaker: God
